---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: VineshReddyK
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or gap this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Affected Service(s)

Which microservice(s) would this change touch? (api-gateway / user-service / order-service / payment-service / notification-service / ai-service / k8s-operator)

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or approaches you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, diagrams, or screenshots about the feature request.
